Canada shares the same driving side and very similar road marking standards as the US. However, the specific architectural style of the brick buildings and the prevalence of full-size American pickup trucks make the US a more likely candidate than Canada.

The combination of full-size pickup trucks (Ford F-series/Chevrolet Silverado style), the specific red fire hydrant design visible in the distance, and the red brick commercial architecture is highly characteristic of small-town USA.
